headline: Understand any confusing letter in seconds.
subhead: Paste the text, snap a photo, or just talk. ClarityAI explains it in plain language, lays out exactly what to do, and points you to trusted local help.
demo_subtitle: One tap loads a real-world document and runs the whole pipeline.
input_choose: How would you like to start?
placeholder: Tell us what's going on, for example: 'I got this letter and I don't understand the deadline.' Or paste the notice, bill, or form here.
voice_prompt: Start talking, for example: “I got a letter saying I have three days to pay my rent or leave.”
upload_hint: Drop a PDF or image here, or tap to browse. Max 10 MB.
file_too_big: That file is over 10 MB. Please choose a smaller one.
footer: Private by design. ClarityAI never files or submits anything for you.
voice_unsupported: Voice input isn't supported on this browser. Try typing instead.
resume_hint: Tap to continue where you left off
no_action_steps: This document doesn't call for specific action steps. Head to the Summary tab for the full explanation.
source_hint: This is the exact text ClarityAI read. Always check dates and dollar amounts against it.
finding_resource: Finding a trustworthy organization and checking it's the right fit
no_resource: We couldn't pin down a specific local organization for this one. The steps in your plan still apply, and 211.org or your local legal aid or benefits office can point you to help nearby.
confidence_hint: How clearly the source text supports this analysis, as assessed by the model.
confidence_tooltip: How confident the AI is in the extracted details (including deadlines). Always verify against the original.
ack_label: I verify that I will use this AI summary strictly as an organizational guide and understand that it does not provide official medical or legal decisions.
unlock_hint: Tick the box above to unlock the buttons below.
share_footer: Generated by ClarityAI — any document, in plain language.
this_document_hint: Save a clean copy to keep or share, or start fresh with another letter.
your_privacy_hint: We store nothing on our servers. The only thing saved on this device is your session history and checklist progress, and you can wipe it all instantly.
erase_confirm: Erase all ClarityAI data stored on this device?
disclaimer_body: ClarityAI helps you understand and organize. It never files or submits anything for you, and it isn't a substitute for advice from a lawyer, doctor, or caseworker.
hackathon_credit: USAII Global AI Hackathon · Crisis-to-Action Translator
skeleton_privacy: Privacy Protected: Redacting sensitive PII before AI processing...
skeleton_body: Pulling out the deadlines, the costs, and exactly what to do next. This takes a few seconds.
privacy_protected: Privacy Protected: {n} sensitive item(s) redacted before AI processing.
history_empty: No history yet. Translate a document to see it here.
no_chats_body: Create a chat first and your workspace will appear here.
chat_intro: Ask anything about this document. ClarityAI answers from what it read — your questions stay on this device.
chat_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
chat_not_configured: The AI service isn't configured yet.
chat_disclaimer: ClarityAI explains and organizes. It is not a substitute for a lawyer, doctor, or caseworker.
chat_suggest_1: What are the most important dates?
chat_suggest_2: What happens if I do nothing?
chat_suggest_3: Who can I contact for help?
err_not_configured: The AI service isn't configured yet. Add an NVIDIA_API_KEY to the backend.
err_trouble_reading: ClarityAI had trouble reading that. Please try again.
err_blur_photo: This photo is a bit too blurry for us to read accurately. To ensure we give you the right guidance, please take another photo with good lighting.
err_need_detail: We couldn't quite make sense of that. Please add a little more detail about your situation.
err_unreachable: Something went wrong reaching the translator.
install_body: Add it to your home screen for quick, offline-friendly access.
not_found_body: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.
print_generated: Generated {date} · A plain-language guide, not legal, medical, or financial advice.
